about.title: About
about.subtitle: Me
about.role: Tech Lead & Senior Full Stack Developer
about.description_1: I am a Tech Lead and Senior Full Stack Developer with 6 years of experience designing, developing, deploying, and maintaining web and mobile applications. I specialize in enterprise-level applications with a strong focus on
about.description_3: for cross-platform and native mobile solutions.
about.description_4: I lead tech teams, manage robust infrastructures on AWS, and believe in the continuous improvement of engineering processes.

dev.title: Full Stack Developer
dev.desc: Specialized in Ruby on Rails & JavaScript

mobile.title: Mobile Engineer
mobile.desc: Building apps with Kotlin, Swift & KMP

items.project_1_desc: An e-commerce platform built with Ruby on Rails and React. Includes payment gateway integration and inventory management.
items.project_2_desc: A native Android application written in Kotlin for task management with offline support.
items.project_3_desc: An iOS application built in Swift for real-time fitness tracking and analytics.
items.project_4_desc: Comprehensive multi-tenant mobile ecosystem with integrated payment solutions (Stripe, Openpay, FEMSA). Managed the complete production release cycle for multiple branded tenants.
items.project_5_desc: Robust Point of Sale (POS) solution for high-volume transactions. Integrated multiple financial technologies to provide a unified and secure payment experience.
items.project_6_desc: Migration of the user ecosystem to Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP). Centralized business logic for iOS and Android, ensuring consistency and reducing maintenance overhead.
items.project_7_desc: Optimized white-label platform for mobile top-ups. Designed for maximum accessibility, allowing users to recharge without a dedicated app or data connection through carrier provisioning.
items.project_8_desc: High-traffic white-label portal for end-users to manage accounts, monitor consumption, and handle payments. Engineered for high availability and seamless user experience.
items.project_9_desc: Multi-tenant administration system for sales force and POS management. Includes advanced segmentation, auditing, and deep integration with mobile carriers and diverse payment processors.
items.project_10_desc: Scalable e-commerce platform with iframe support and logistics automation (99minutos). Supports complex payment flows (Stripe, Toku) and integrated lead traceability.
items.project_11_desc: High-performance professional portfolio featuring advanced SVG/3D backgrounds, custom animation systems, and full i18n support. Designed for a premium responsive experience.

experiences.title: Tech Lead / Senior Full Stack
achievements: Technical Leadership & Team Management: Supervision of developers, strategic planning, mentoring, and training.
Enterprise Solutions Development: Direction and maintenance of complex CRM systems for administration and sales.
Architecture & Cloud (AWS): Design, management, and deployment of robust cloud infrastructures for scalability.
Mobile & Web Development: Native and cross-platform applications with Ruby on Rails, JavaScript, Kotlin, and Swift (iOS).
Integrations & Deployments: Integration of payment gateways and third-party APIs, and software lifecycle management.

experiences.title: Software Developer
achievements: Development, optimization, and maintenance of software applications using Ruby on Rails and JavaScript.
Collaboration in the full software development cycle and implementation of code best practices.

experiences.title: Trainee Developer
achievements: Participation in the development of corporate web platforms as a developer in Ruby on Rails and Ember JS.

experiences.title: Freelance Developer
achievements: Development of scripts in C# and game logic design using the Unity engine.
Story writing and narrative structuring for interactive projects.

education.details: Software engineering student with solid foundations in algorithm design, data structures, and development methodologies.
